elevenlabs.notes: Margot-only TTS voice. Do NOT use ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID (other agents). SSOT mirrored in app/server/margot_voice.py and @unite-group/brand-config MARGOT_ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID.

identity.presentation: realistic original adult woman, professional executive operator, not robotic
identity.skin: light tan skin with natural texture
identity.wardrobe: crisp fitted white collar polo shirt with tasteful Unite-Group chest branding
identity.demeanour: calm, direct, warm, high-trust, operationally sharp
identity.brand_boundary: brand-safe and client-safe; no deliberate sexualisation, no celebrity likeness, no robot parts

base_prompt: Create a photorealistic original AI assistant character named Margot for the Unite-Group Nexus ecosystem. Margot is a 32-year-old adult woman with a polished blonde shoulder-length blowout, light tan skin with natural texture, a calm direct expression, and a professional executive-operator presence. She is not robotic and has no robot parts. She wears a crisp fitted white collar polo shirt with tasteful Unite-Group chest branding. Keep the identity consistent with the canonical Margot avatar while making the output suitable for business software, founder operations, and client-safe project surfaces. No celebrity likeness. No deliberate sexualisation.

unite-group.overlay: Use broad Unite-Group operating-system cues: executive command centre, portfolio intelligence, clean white and navy branding, trusted founder-side operator.

pi-dev-ops.overlay: Emphasise autonomous engineering operations: repo dashboards, build evidence, quiet technical confidence, precise DevOps control surfaces.

synthex.overlay: Emphasise marketing automation and creative production: campaign boards, media variants, polished growth-operator energy, no hype.

restoreassist.overlay: Emphasise restoration-field support: practical operator confidence, property restoration context, clear mobile-first task handoff.

carsi.overlay: Emphasise compliance and audit readiness: precise documentation, checklists, assurance posture, disciplined risk control.

dr-nrpg.overlay: Emphasise disaster recovery and industry association authority: calm crisis coordination, standards, training, and sector leadership.

ccw.overlay: Emphasise trade-commerce and customer operations: practical sales support, supplier trust, service responsiveness, clean CRM context.

avatar.direction: Three-quarter portrait, neutral studio background, realistic commercial photography, reusable assistant avatar.

dashboard.direction: Waist-up dashboard companion pose, slightly angled toward a product cockpit, enough negative space for UI chrome.

project-card.direction: Project-specific card hero, professional portrait plus subtle contextual background cues, no decorative clutter.

media-reference.direction: Clean reference image for future thumbnails, decks, and video keyframes; high identity consistency and readable Unite-Group branding.

safety_rules: Keep Margot realistic, original, adult, and professional.
Do not imitate a real celebrity or named public figure.
Do not add deliberate sexual emphasis or body-emphasis details.
Do not include secrets, customer data, private documents, or live screenshots.
Do not imply public endorsement by Unite-Group clients or partners.
